arts.ttl: Former Chelsea chief executive Marina Granovskaia wins High Court battle with agent over multi-million-pound dispute relating to Kurt Zouma's 2021 transfer to West Ham
arts.sum: Former Chelsea CEO Marina Granovskaia has welcomed the High Court's decision to rule in her favour in a legal battle with football agent Saif Alrubie.

arts.ttl: Three positive changes Graham Potter has implemented at West Ham
arts.sum: Following the painful period under Julen Lopetegui, West Ham fans might’ve expected more of the same under his replacement, Graham Potter. The former Brighton manager’s reputation had taken a hit after his time at Chelsea and he was somewhat of a forgotten man. Fast forward to today, though, and Potter has clearly mixed things up... The post Three positive changes Graham Potter has implemented at West Ham appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: 'To be honest' - Ex-West Ham boss makes fresh admission on Tim Steidten
arts.sum: West Ham parted ways with both Julen Lopetegui and Tim Steidten over the last few months. The current campaign has certainly been one to forget... The post 'To be honest' - Ex-West Ham boss makes fresh admission on Tim Steidten appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. West Ham United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Everton and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Jarrad Branthwaite reveals new stadium ambition as David Moyes details talks after Everton snub
arts.sum: David Moyes has explained what he said to Jarrad Branthwaite after he was left out of the England squad as the defender outlined his new stadium ambitions with Everton

arts.ttl: David Moyes issues update on Everton summer transfer plans after Kevin Thelwell departure
arts.sum: David Moyes has been addressing summer transfer recruitment and player fitness ahead of Everton's game with West Ham United

arts.ttl: West Ham United heading to US for Premier League Summer Series 2025 - tickets now on General Sale
arts.sum: It will be a huge honour to represent West Ham United in some amazing cities and at three iconic stadiums, in what will be a unique and exciting experience for everyone involved. We are really looking forward to meeting our supporters - as well as potential new Hammers fans and the people and communities of New Jersey, Chicago and Atlanta - and playing in front of them against Premier League opponents to prepare for the 2025/26 season.”

arts.ttl: “We love it” | Mark Noble on West Ham’s USA pre-season trip
arts.sum: West Ham Director of football Mark Noble is excited for the clubs pre-season trip to the USA this summer. The Hammers will jet across the Atlantic for the second successive summer to take on Everton, AFC Bournemouth and Manchester United in Chicago, Atlanta and New Jersey respectively. In an interview with NBC Sports, Noble said:... The post “We love it” | Mark Noble on West Ham’s USA pre-season trip appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.sum: Live updates from Finch Farm as David Moyes holds his press conference ahead of the home match against West Ham United

arts.ttl: Moyes wins ELEVENTH Barclays Manager of the Month award
arts.sum: David Moyes has been named the Barclays Manager of the Month for February 2025, winning the award for the 11th time in his career. Everton's manager moves joint-third in the all-time list, level with Pep Guardiola, with only Sir Alex Ferguson and Arsene Wenger claiming the award on more occasions.
